name: Airline Pilot — TL2 Meals, Foreign Union Dues, and T4PS
description: Complete David MacLeod's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return. His tax documents are located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\macleod\. Save the completed return as 'david_macleod.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Form TL2 (2024); CRA T4PS rules; Bank of Canada average exchange rates
metadata.key_complexity: TL2 at 50% aviation rate vs 80% trucker rate; USD union dues requiring CAD conversion; T4PS with split allocations
